description: Chronicler butler: participant resolution telemetry and episode list filter distribution. Panels wired for metrics shipped in PR #1874 (bu-zxoxk). Source: src/butlers/chronicler/adapters/calendar.py:98 (counter) and roster/chronicler/api/router.py:304-312 (OTel span).

panels.description: Rate of episode_entities participant rows resolved by the calendar adapter, by butler schema. Metric: chronicler_episode_participants_resolved_total{schema} — counter incremented by len(participant_ids) per episode (owner row excluded). Shipped in PR #1874 (bu-zxoxk). Source: src/butlers/chronicler/adapters/calendar.py:98.
panels.title: Participant resolution rate by schema

panels.description: Rate of /api/chronicler/episodes requests grouped by the chronicler.episodes.filter_kind OTel span attribute (participant_join | owner_only | none). Shipped in PR #1874 (bu-zxoxk). Source: roster/chronicler/api/router.py:304-312. NOTE: This panel queries Tempo directly via TraceQL metrics — the filter_kind attribute is NOT available as a Prometheus label because the Tempo metrics generator (tempo/config.yaml) does not configure custom span-metrics dimensions. Live-stack verification is deferred until after at least one production deploy cycle following the PR #1874 rollout.
panels.title: Episode list filter_kind request rate

title: Butlers — Chronicler
